  Source   Edit

Types

GitTreeWalkCallback = proc (root: cstring; entry: ptr git_tree_entry;
                            payload: pointer): cint
  Source   Edit 
GitBranchType = enum
  gbtLocal = (1, "local"), gbtRemote = (2, "remote"), gbtAll = (3, "all")
  Source   Edit 
GitTreeWalkMode = enum
  gtwPre = (0, "pre"), gtwPost = (1, "post")
  Source   Edit 
GitRepoState = enum
  grsNone = (0, "none"), grsMerge = (1, "merge"), grsRevert = (2, "revert"),
  grsRevertSequence = (3, "revert sequence"),
  grsCherrypick = (4, "cherrypick"),
  grsCherrypickSequence = (5, "cherrypick sequence"),
  grsBisect = (6, "bisect"), grsRebase = (7, "rebase"),
  grsRebaseInteractive = (8, "rebase interactive"),
  grsRebaseMerge = (9, "rebase merge"),
  grsApplyMailbox = (10, "apply mailbox"),
  grsApplyMailboxOrRebase = (11, "apply mailbox or rebase")
  Source   Edit 
GitPathSpecFlag = enum
  gpsDefault = (0, "default"), gpsIgnoreCase = (1, "ignore case"),
  gpsUseCase = (2, "use case"), gpsNoGlob = (4, "no glob"),
  gpsNoMatchError = (8, "no match error"),
  gpsFindFailures = (16, "find failures"),
  gpsFailuresOnly = (32, "failures only")
  Source   Edit 
GitStatusShow = enum
  ssIndexAndWorkdir = (0, "index and workdir"),
  ssIndexOnly = (1, "index only"), ssWorkdirOnly = (2, "workdir only")
  Source   Edit 
GitStatusOption = enum
  gsoIncludeUntracked = (1, "include untracked"),
  gsoIncludeIgnored = (2, "include ignored"),
  gsoIncludeUnmodified = (4, "include unmodified"),
  gsoExcludeSubmodules = (8, "exclude submodules"),
  gsoRecurseUntrackedDirs = (16, "recurse untracked dirs"),
  gsoDisablePathspecMatch = (32, "disable pathspec match"),
  gsoRecurseIgnoredDirs = (64, "recurse ignored dirs"),
  gsoRenamesHeadToIndex = (128, "renames head to index"),
  gsoRenamesIndexToWorkdir = (256, "renames index to workdir"),
  gsoSortCaseSensitively = (512, "sort case sensitively"),
  gsoSortCaseInsensitively = (1024, "sort case insensitively"),
  gsoRenamesFromRewrites = (2048, "renames from rewrites"),
  gsoNoRefresh = (4096, "no refresh"), gsoUpdateIndex = (8192, "update index"),
  gsoIncludeUnreadable = (16384, "include unreadable")
  Source   Edit 
GitStatusFlag = enum
  gsfCurrent = (0, "current"), gsfIndexNew = (1, "index new"),
  gsfIndexModified = (2, "index modified"),
  gsfIndexDeleted = (4, "index deleted"),
  gsfIndexRenamed = (8, "index renamed"),
  gsfIndexTypechange = (16, "index typechange"),
  gsfTreeNew = (128, "tree new"), gsfTreeModified = (256, "tree modified"),
  gsfTreeDeleted = (512, "tree deleted"),
  gsfTreeTypechange = (1024, "tree typechange"),
  gsfTreeRenamed = (2048, "tree renamed"), gsfIgnored = (16384, "ignored"),
  gsfConflicted = (32768, "conflicted")
  Source   Edit 
GitCheckoutStrategy = enum
  gcsNone = (0, "dry run"), gcsSafe = (1, "safe"), gcsForce = (2, "force"),
  gcsRecreateMissing = (4, "recreate missing"),
  gcsAllowConflicts = (16, "allow conflicts"),
  gcsRemoveUntracked = (32, "remove untracked"),
  gcsRemoveIgnored = (64, "remove ignored"),
  gcsUpdateOnly = (128, "update only"),
  gcsDontUpdateIndex = (256, "don\'t update index"),
  gcsNoRefresh = (512, "no refresh"),
  gcsSkipUnmerged = (1024, "skip unmerged"), gcsUseOurs = (2048, "use ours"),
  gcsUseTheirs = (4096, "use theirs"),
  gcsDisablePathspecMatch = (8192, "disable pathspec match"),
  gcsUpdateSubmodules = (65536, "update submodules"),
  gcsUpdateSubmodulesIfChanged = (131072, "update submodules if changed"),
  gcsSkipLockedDirectories = (262144, "skip locked directories"),
  gcsDontOverwriteIgnored = (524288, "don\'t overwrite ignored"),
  gcsConflictStyleMerge = (1048576, "conflict style merge"),
  gcsConflictStyleDiff3 = (2097152, "conflict style diff3"),
  gcsDontRemoveExisting = (4194304, "don\'t remove existing"),
  gcsDontWriteIndex = (8388608, "don\'t write index")
  Source   Edit 
GitCheckoutNotify = enum
  gcnNone = (0, "none"), gcnConflict = (1, "conflict"),
  gcnDirty = (2, "dirty"), gcnUpdated = (4, "updated"),
  gcnUntracked = (8, "untracked"), gcnIgnored = (16, "ignored"),
  gcnAll = (65535, "all")
  Source   Edit 
GitResultCode = enum
  grcApplyFail = (-35, "patch failed"), grcIndexDirty = (-34, "dirty index"),
  grcMismatch = (-33, "hash mismatch"), grcRetry = (-32, "retry"),
  grcIterOver = (-31, "end of iteration"),
  grcPassThrough = (-30, "pass-through"),
  grcMergeConflict = (-24, "merge conflict"),
  grcDirectory = (-23, "directory"), grcUncommitted = (-22, "uncommitted"),
  grcInvalid = (-21, "invalid"), grcEndOfFile = (-20, "end-of-file"),
  grcPeel = (-19, "peel"), grcApplied = (-18, "applied"),
  grcCertificate = (-17, "certificate"),
  grcAuthentication = (-16, "authentication"), grcModified = (-15, "modified"),
  grcLocked = (-14, "locked"), grcConflict = (-13, "conflict"),
  grcInvalidSpec = (-12, "invalid spec"),
  grcNonFastForward = (-11, "not fast-forward"),
  grcUnmerged = (-10, "unmerged"), grcUnbornBranch = (-9, "unborn branch"),
  grcBareRepo = (-8, "bare repository"), grcUser = (-7, "user-specified"),
  grcBuffer = (-6, "buffer overflow"), grcAmbiguous = (-5, "ambiguous match"),
  grcExists = (-4, "object exists"), grcNotFound = (-3, "not found"),
  grcError = (-1, "generic error"), grcOk = (0, "ok")
  Source   Edit 
GitErrorClass = enum
  gecNone = (0, "none"), gecNoMemory = (1, "no memory"), gecOS = (2, "os"),
  gecInvalid = (3, "invalid"), gecReference = (4, "reference"),
  gecZlib = (5, "zlib"), gecRepository = (6, "repository"),
  gecConfig = (7, "config"), gecRegEx = (8, "regex"), gecODB = (9, "odb"),
  gecIndex = (10, "index"), gecObject = (11, "object"),
  gecNet = (12, "network"), gecTag = (13, "tag"), gecTree = (14, "tree"),
  gecIndexer = (15, "indexer"), gecSSL = (16, "ssl"),
  gecSubModule = (17, "submodule"), gecThread = (18, "thread"),
  gecStash = (19, "stash"), gecCheckOut = (20, "check out"),
  gecFetchHead = (21, "fetch head"), gecMerge = (22, "merge"),
  gecSSH = (23, "ssh"), gecFilter = (24, "filter"), gecRevert = (25, "revert"),
  gecCallBack = (26, "call back"), gecCherryPick = (27, "cherry pick"),
  gecDescribe = (28, "describe"), gecReBase = (29, "re-base"),
  gecFileSystem = (30, "filesystem"), gecPatch = (31, "patch"),
  gecWorkTree = (32, "work tree"), gecSHA1 = (33, "sha1")
  Source   Edit 
GitObjectKind = enum
  goAny = (0, "object"), goInvalid = (1, "invalid"), goCommit = (3, "commit"),
  goTree = (4, "tree"), goBlob = (5, "blob"), goTag = (6, "tag"),
  goOfsDelta = (8, "ofs"), goRefDelta = (9, "ref")
  Source   Edit 
GitThing = ref object
  o*: GitObject
  case kind*: GitObjectKind
  of goTag:
      nil

  of goRefDelta:
      nil

  of goTree:
      nil

  else:
      nil
  Source   Edit 
GitBuf = ptr git_buf
  Source   Edit 
GitDiff = ptr git_diff
  Source   Edit 
GitPathSpec = ptr git_pathspec
  Source   Edit 
GitRevWalker = ptr git_revwalk
  Source   Edit 
GitTreeEntry = ptr git_tree_entry
  Source   Edit 
GitTreeEntries = seq[GitTreeEntry]
  Source   Edit 
GitObject = ptr git_object
  Source   Edit 
GitOid = ptr git_oid
  Source   Edit 
GitOids = seq[GitOid]
  Source   Edit 
GitRemote = ptr git_remote
  Source   Edit 
GitReference = ptr git_reference
  Source   Edit 
GitRepository = ptr git_repository
  Source   Edit 
GitStrArray = ptr git_strarray
  Source   Edit 
GitTag = ptr git_tag
  Source   Edit 
GitCommit = ptr git_commit
  Source   Edit 
GitStatus = ptr git_status_entry
  Source   Edit 
GitStatusList = ptr git_status_list
  Source   Edit 
GitTree = ptr git_tree
  Source   Edit 
GitSignature = ptr git_signature
  Source   Edit 
GitTagTable = OrderedTableRef[string, GitThing]
  Source   Edit 
GitResult[T] = Result[T, GitResultCode]
  Source   Edit

Procs

proc hash(gcs: GitCheckoutStrategy): Hash {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
convenience   Source   Edit 
proc dumpError(code: GitResultCode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieves the last git error message   Source   Edit 
proc init(): bool {...}{.raises: [Exception],
                    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
initialize the library to prepare for git operations; returns true if libgit2 was initialized   Source   Edit 
proc shutdown(): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
shutdown the library, freeing any libgit2 data; returns true if shutdown was successful   Source   Edit 
proc free[T: GitHeapGits](point: ptr T)
perform a free of a git-managed pointer   Source   Edit 
proc free[T: NimHeapGits](point: ptr T)
perform a free of a nim-alloced pointer to git data   Source   Edit 
proc free(thing: sink GitThing) {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
free a git thing and its gitobject contents appropriately   Source   Edit 
proc free(entries: sink GitTreeEntries) {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
git tree entries need a special free   Source   Edit 
proc free(s: string) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
for template compatability only   Source   Edit 
proc short(oid: GitOid; size: int): GitResult[string] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
shorten an oid to a string of the given length   Source   Edit 
proc url(remote: GitRemote): Uri {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
retrieve the url of a remote   Source   Edit 
proc oid(entry: GitTreeEntry): GitOid {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the oid of the input   Source   Edit 
proc oid(got: GitReference): GitOid {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the oid of the input   Source   Edit 
proc oid(obj: GitObject): GitOid {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the oid of the input   Source   Edit 
proc oid(thing: GitThing): GitOid {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the oid of the input   Source   Edit 
proc oid(tag: GitTag): GitOid {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the oid of the input   Source   Edit 
func name(got: GitReference): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the name of the input   Source   Edit 
func name(entry: GitTreeEntry): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the name of the input   Source   Edit 
func name(remote: GitRemote): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the name of the input   Source   Edit 
func isTag(got: GitReference): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
true if the supplied reference is a tag   Source   Edit 
proc flags(status: GitStatus): set[GitStatusFlag] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
produce the set of flags indicating the status of the file   Source   Edit 
proc repositoryPath(repo: GitRepository): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
the path of the .git folder, or the repo itself if it's bare   Source   Edit 
func `$`(tags: GitTagTable): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit 
func `$`(buffer: ptr git_buf): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit 
func `$`(oid: GitOid): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit 
func `$`(entry: GitTreeEntry): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
func `$`(obj: GitObject): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
string representation of git object   Source   Edit 
func `$`(commit: GitCommit): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
func `$`(thing: GitThing): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
func `$`(status: GitStatus): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
proc copy(commit: GitCommit): GitResult[GitCommit] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a copy of the commit; free it with free   Source   Edit 
proc copy(thing: GitThing): GitResult[GitThing] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a copy of the thing; free it with free   Source   Edit 
proc copy(oid: GitOid): GitResult[GitOid] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a copy of the oid; free it with dealloc   Source   Edit 
proc branchName(got: GitReference): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
fetch a branch name assuming the reference is a branch   Source   Edit 
proc isBranch(got: GitReference): bool {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
true if the supplied reference is a branch   Source   Edit 
proc owner(thing: GitThing): GitRepository {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the repository that owns this thing   Source   Edit 
proc owner(commit: GitCommit): GitRepository {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the repository that owns this commit   Source   Edit 
proc owner(reference: GitReference): GitRepository {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve the repository that owns this reference   Source   Edit 
proc message(commit: GitCommit): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
retrieve the message associated with a git commit   Source   Edit 
proc message(tag: GitTag): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
retrieve the message associated with a git tag   Source   Edit 
proc message(thing: GitThing): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError, ValueError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
retrieve the message associated with a git thing   Source   Edit 
proc summary(commit: GitCommit): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
produce a summary for a given commit   Source   Edit 
proc summary(thing: GitThing): string {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError, ValueError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
produce a summary for a git thing   Source   Edit 
proc free(table: sink GitTagTable) {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
free a tag table   Source   Edit 
proc hash(oid: GitOid): Hash {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
the hash of a git oid is a function of its string representation   Source   Edit 
proc hash(tag: GitTag): Hash {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
two tags are the same if they have the same name   Source   Edit 
proc hash(thing: GitThing): Hash {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
two git things are unique unless they share the same oid   Source   Edit 
proc commit(thing: GitThing): GitCommit {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
turn a thing into its commit   Source   Edit 
proc committer(thing: GitThing): GitSignature {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
get the committer of a thing that's a commit   Source   Edit 
proc author(thing: GitThing): GitSignature {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
get the author of a thing that's a commit   Source   Edit 
proc clone(uri: Uri; path: string; branch = ""): GitResult[GitRepository] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
clone a repository   Source   Edit 
proc setHeadDetached(repo: GitRepository; oid: GitOid): GitResultCode {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
detach the HEAD and point it at the given OID   Source   Edit 
proc setHeadDetached(repo: GitRepository; reference: string): GitResultCode {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError, Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
point the repo's head at the given reference   Source   Edit 
proc repositoryOpen(path: string): GitResult[GitRepository] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
open a repository by path; the repository must be freed   Source   Edit 
proc openRepository(path: string): GitResult[GitRepository] {...}{.
    deprecated: "use repositoryOpen", raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
Deprecated: use repositoryOpen
alias for repositoryOpen   Source   Edit 
proc repositoryHead(repo: GitRepository): GitResult[GitReference] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
fetch the reference for the repository's head; the reference must be freed   Source   Edit 
proc headReference(repo: GitRepository): GitResult[GitReference] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
alias for repositoryHead   Source   Edit 
proc remoteLookup(repo: GitRepository; name: string): GitResult[GitRemote] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
get the remote by name; the remote must be freed   Source   Edit 
proc remoteRename(repo: GitRepository; prior: string; next: string): GitResult[
    seq[string]] {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
                   tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
rename a remote   Source   Edit 
proc remoteDelete(repo: GitRepository; name: string): GitResultCode {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
delete a remote from the repository   Source   Edit 
proc remoteCreate(repo: GitRepository; name: string; url: Uri): GitResult[
    GitRemote] {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
                 tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    raises: [Exception, OSError, Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

                tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

              payload: pointer): GitResultCode {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

proc newSignature(name, email: string; time: Time): GitResult[GitSignature] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
create a new signature using arguments; must be freed (this does not yet support the offset-in-minutes specification)   Source   Edit

    raises: [Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

    Exception, OSError, ResultError[gittyup.GitResultCode], Exception, OSError,
    ResultError[gittyup.GitResultCode]],

proc repositoryDiscover(path: string; ceilings: seq[string] = @[]; xfs = true): GitResult[
    string] {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
              tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
try to find the path of a repository in path or a parent; xfs allows cross-filesystem traversal, while ceilings holds stop-dirs.   Source   Edit

Iterators

iterator status(repository: GitRepository; show: GitStatusShow;
                flags = defaultStatusFlags): GitResult[GitStatus] {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, OSError, Exception, OSError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
iterate over files in the repo using the given search flags   Source   Edit

    Exception, OSError, ResultError[system.void],
    ResultError[gittyup.GitResultCode], Exception, OSError,
    ResultError[system.void]], tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}

iterator commitsForSpec(repo: GitRepository; spec: openArray[string]): GitResult[
    GitThing] {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError, ResultError[system.void],
                         ResultError[gittyup.GitResultCode]],
                tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
yield each commit that matches the provided pathspec   Source   Edit 
iterator branches(repo: GitRepository; flags = {gbtLocal, gbtRemote}): GitResult[
    GitReference] {...}{.raises: [Exception, OSError],
                    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect].}
this time, you're just gonna have to guess at what this proc might do... (also, you're just gonna have to free your references...)   Source   Edit

Templates

template gitFail(code: GitResultCode; body: untyped)
a version of gitTrap that expects failure; no error messages!   Source   Edit 
template gitFail(allocd: typed; code: GitResultCode; body: untyped)
a version of gitTrap that expects failure; no error messages!   Source   Edit 
template gitTrap(code: GitResultCode; body: untyped)
trap an api result code, dump it via logging, run the body as an error handler   Source   Edit 
template gitTrap(allocd: typed; code: GitResultCode; body: untyped)
trap an api result code, dump it via logging, run the body as an error handler   Source   Edit 
template ok[T](self: var Result[T, GitResultCode]; x: T): auto
  Source   Edit 
template err[T](self: var Result[T, GitResultCode]; x: GitResultCode): auto
  Source   Edit 
template ok[T](x: T): auto
  Source   Edit 
template err[T](x: GitResultCode): auto
  Source   Edit 
template `:=`[T](v: untyped{nkIdent}; vv: Result[T, GitResultCode];
                 body: untyped): untyped
  Source   Edit
